summary: Completed comprehensive frontend regression testing for 4 user-requested changes: (1) AUTO-RESPONSIVE on any mobile screen (FitWidth component), (2) ROULETTE CINEMATIC CAMERA zoom, (3) BACKGROUND MUSIC DISABLED, (4) AVIATOR SOUND REWORK. All features tested and verified working correctly.
passed_tests: RESPONSIVE at 320px: All 9 game pages (fun-roulette, triple-fun, joker-bonus, lucky-8-line, poker, teen-patti, champion-poker, no-hold, aviator) - NO horizontal overflow detected, all boards visible
RESPONSIVE at 430px: Spot-checked fun-roulette and lucky-8-line - boards centered, no overflow
RESPONSIVE at 768px: Spot-checked fun-roulette and lucky-8-line - boards centered, no overflow
ROULETTE CAMERA: Cinematic zoom verified - scale 1.34 during NO MORE BETS phase, scale 1.0 after ball lands (5.6s timer working)
ROULETTE BETTING at 320px: Chip selection working, straight bet on number 20 placed successfully, split bet on 2-3 placed successfully, chips appear centered on spots, my-total updates correctly
SLOTS REGRESSION (Triple Fun 777): Full spin cycle observed - reels spin blurred, stop left-to-right staggered, result label updates (PAIR - STAKE BACK displayed correctly)
CARD GAMES REGRESSION (Teen Patti): Cards deal progressively during REVEAL phase - 2 dealer + 3 player cards dealt face-down one by one, then flipped to reveal (Q♥9♥2♥ vs K♣8♠8♥), no flicker detected

AVIATOR REGRESSION: Page loads correctly, multiplier climbs during FLYING (1.42x → 2.04x → 10.29x), 'FLEW AWAY' message shows on crash, betting panels render, no JS console errors about 'flight' or 'sfx'
GLOBAL: NO console errors detected on any visited page (AudioContext warnings excluded as expected)
